message: Node started: Analyze the relationship between modular flow (Tomita-Takesaki theory) and the Thermal Time Hypothesis. Specifically, determine if modular flow correctly generates time evolution for excited states (which are typically not KMS states relative to the vacuum/ground state). Identify the scaling law involved and explain how the preparation history of the state affects the validity of the thermal time interpretation. Provide the answer in the requested FINAL_ANSWER and JUSTIFICATION format.
